amazon_product_details_section.Best Sellers Rank: 4,423 in Fashion (See Top 100 in Fashion) 1 in Baby Boys' First Walking Shoes

description: Product Description COMFORTABLE Soft, breathable cotton, lightweight and gripper bottom design, perfect for new walkers playing indoors. Also, the boots are wide and there is enough space for baby's feet to grow. This is the best choice for babies with chubby feet! SAFE No stimulation to the baby's skin. They are lightweight and allow natural ankle movement while providing excellent protection. They are very durable and easy to wash. CLOSURE Velcro closure easy to put on, take off and most importantly stay on your child's feet! Perfect gifts for winter days, indoor or outdoor walks, party, baby shower to keep baby feet warm and comfortable all day. MATERIAL Infant ankle boots are made of soft and breathable cotton upper with fleece lining. And the bottom of the shoe is with delicate and non-slip design and material. They are very light and comfortable, flexible, elastic boys' shoes that can support natural foot movement. Size information for reference: Length: 11 cm Recommended age: Fit for 0-6 months Length: 12 cm Recommended age: Fit for 6-12 months Length: 13 cm Recommended age: Fit for 12-18 months NOTE: Please allow 1-2 cm error due to manual measurement and make sure you don't mind before ordering. Due to the difference between different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual colour of the item. Thank you. 1 inch = 2.54 cm Poly-cotton / warm fleece Points non-slip rubber grippers on the bottom Fleece baby shoes for unisex baby Adorable ankle support Newborn Shoes Baby Shoes Kids Shoes Toddler Shoes Baby shoes are ideal for beginners Item type: Baby shoes Material: High quality cotton upper, soft velvet sole, fleece lining for comfort. Colour: White, Black, Khaki, Pink, Grey, Red Closure: Velcro Size: Fit for 0-18 months baby Season: Spring, Autumn, Winter Gender: Unisex baby Package includes: 1 pair of baby shoes COSY DEAL BOOTS DO NOT BUDGE DESIGNED FOR LAST GREAT GIFT SIMPLE FABRIC Soft, non-slip bottoms to reduce accidents on slippery floors. High quality cotton and fleece provide comfort, warmth and protection for baby's feet. Natural and breathable material that ensures all day comfort for baby's little feet and promotes healthy foot growth. Designed to stay stable on baby's feet with the adjustable velcro strap and elastic ankle. Prevents shoes from falling off so no more lost socks or shoes!
